name: Transplantation of Autologously Derived Mitochondria Following Ischemia
short_name: Autologous mitochondrial transplantation ECMO ischemia registry
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov registry record for a recruiting Boston Children's Hospital study of autologous mitochondrial transplantation for pediatric patients on ECMO with concern for ischemic injury; status and dates are recorded as of June 3, 2026, with last update posted January 5, 2026 and no posted results.
